title: Kung Fu Bustle
description: As summertime approached, Lord Nunchucks was becoming one of the most eligible—and dangerous—suitors of the season.
quote: While you were flirting with a duke, I studied the nunchuck.
altHero: a well-dressed lady punching Lord Nunchucks in the gut
alt1: Lord Nunchucks facinga way, holding nunchucks
alt4: woman in tears hugging Lord Nunchucks
